narratives.Overview: Implement the marky CLI using commander.js with a lint subcommand. Accepts file globs, directories, or stdin. Supports --format (pretty|json) and --config flags. Exits non-zero on any error-severity violation. Includes a pretty terminal reporter (chalk + figures) and a JSON reporter. Covers FR-6, FR-7.

items.title: `crackdown lint <glob|dir>` command implemented via commander.js; accepts one or more path arguments
--format flag accepts 'pretty' (default) and 'json'; invalid value prints usage and exits 1
--config flag accepts an explicit path to crackdown.config.ts, overriding directory walk
Pretty reporter outputs: filename, line:col, severity icon, rule ID, message; groups violations by file
JSON reporter outputs a JSON array of LintResult objects to stdout
Process exits 0 when no error-severity violations; exits 1 otherwise
Stdin mode: `cat file.md | crackdown lint -` pipes content through the linter
Integration tests cover: clean file exits 0, file with error exits 1, --format json produces parseable output
task check passes at >= 85% coverage for CLI module
